items.prompt: This bridge module’s job is to…
choices: Connect IDE workflow to style and synthesizability awareness
items.explain: Short bridge, not a full RTL course.

items.prompt: A sim pass with lint warnings means…
choices: You should still read the warnings—sim ≠ synth readiness
Lint is always false and can be ignored forever
items.explain: Simulation success does not erase lint.

items.prompt: Track B for this module points at…
choices: The hdl-style and synth-lint browser labs
items.explain: Bridge labs are hdl-style and synth-lint.

items.prompt: Forcing signals in the wave is not a fix for synthesizability problems.
items.explain: Forces hide issues; they do not make RTL synth-clean.
